title: Vehicle movement near storage yard
details: White utility pickup entered restricted lane briefly, then stopped near container row C before exiting.

title: Badge failures at Gate 3
details: Three failed badge attempts within 90 seconds using ID W-447; successful entry was not recorded.

title: Fence alert at Gate 3
details: Perimeter section G3-F12 registered two short vibration spikes; wind conditions were moderate.

title: Drone patrol log near Gate 3
details: Scheduled patrol observed one moving heat signature near fence line and one stationary hotspot near parked equipment.

title: Random noise event
details: 18-second radio interference burst on channel 4, possibly from maintenance handhelds.

title: Late movement in Block C
details: Motion sensor triggered after handover window; could be delayed contractor cleanup or route diversion.
